page: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated, premium storage-capable virtual machine belonging to the EISv5 server family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 architecture server features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 52 physical cores and 104 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 2.8 GHz. It is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 6.46 GB of RAM per core, and features a 48 MB L3 cache. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512F, AVX512_VNNI, and hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES and SHA_NI.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core capabilities and high memory throughput. The server achieved a strong multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 100,847.42 and a top-tier PassMark CPU encryption score of 91,285.35. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 308.31 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads and 120.44 GB/sec for uncached large-block writes. Database operations are robust, demonstrated by a PassMark database score of 30,031.01 and a Redis SET throughput of 90.58 million operations per second. However, single-core performance is average, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1,695.0, and text generation for large 70B LLM models is weak at 2.65 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E104is_v5 offers high resource density and hardware isolation, making it suitable for enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without the overhead of physical hardware management. A key architectural tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, meaning all storage operations must rely on external Premium Storage. Given its massive memory capacity, high multi-threaded performance, and strong database benchmark results, this server is well-suited for large-scale relational databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated, premium storage-capable virtual machine from the EISv5 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 104 vCPUs (52 physical cores) clocked at 2.8 GHz, paired with 672.0 GB of RAM. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it delivers strong multi-core performance, highlighted by a PassMark CPU score of 78,782.73 and top-tier encryption capabilities. Memory bandwidth is excellent, reaching 308.31 GB/sec for large-block reads. However, single-core performance and large LLM text generation are average to weak. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large databases, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated EISv5 virtual machine featuring 104 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8370C processor, optimized for high-throughput database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E104is_v5 is an isolated virtual machine with 104 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon CPU, built for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An isolated, high-capacity virtual machine featuring 104 dedicated vCPUs and 672 GB RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 104 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor
672.0 GB of system memory for high-density, memory-intensive applications
Isolated hardware configuration running on Microsoft Hyper-V
Strong multi-core performance and top-tier cryptographic execution
No local storage, requiring external Premium Storage solutions
Best suited for large databases, enterprise applications, and high-throughput web serving
